sourceMovie.title: Dennis the Menace
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Dennis the Menace (1993) as a family theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The family and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Dennis the Menace clicked for you, The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run (2020) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Dennis the Menace?
faq.answer: Try The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run, Uncle Buck, YES DAY—each shares DNA with Dennis the Menace while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Dennis the Menace?
faq.answer: Dennis the Menace (1993) is best described as Family, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Dennis the Menace part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Dennis the Menace Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
